HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF DEBT MANAGEMENT PARTNERS, LLC's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's motion for judgment on the pleadings under CCP 438 is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 439.
